hero.name: Windy Chen
hero.tagline: AI Product Builder with technical depth
hero.subtitle: 3 career pivots · 4 verticals from 0 to 1 · Bridging tech and business
hero.tagline_en: AI Product Builder · 12 years across 5 industries · Tech-Business translator

about.heading: About
about.bio_1: 12 years across 5 industries and 3 career pivots: from technical translation (shipbuilding, chemical, naval) to big data and finance (Hua Xia Bank, industry research), to AI product management. Each pivot reached independent output within 3-6 months.
about.bio_2: Business + interpretation background, self-taught in Python, TypeScript, Docker, RAG, MCP, LangGraph — the full AI stack. Not a traditional full-stack engineer, but an AI product builder who can rapidly understand new domains, build product infrastructure, and translate bidirectionally between technology and business.
about.bio_3: There's a consistent pattern in what I've done: absorb a new domain fast, build the missing organizational infrastructure, and translate between two groups that can't directly talk to each other. From patent portfolios to data pipelines, from research frameworks to training programs — these things keep running after I leave.
about.languages: Native Chinese · TEM-8 English · Advanced Interpretation

methodology.heading: Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Most PMs talk about what they did. Methodology is how they thought.

items.title: Constraint-Driven Development
items.subtitle: 约束驱动开发
items.summary: Use constraint docs, quality gates, and validation scripts to ensure architectural consistency in complex systems
items.detail: In the RPS research production system: 54 constraint documents, 211 numbered rules, 90+ quality gates, 230 validation scripts — maintaining architectural consistency across 290 version iterations. Each issue is traced via RCA root cause analysis, fixed, and the constraint doc is updated to prevent recurrence.

items.title: Dual-Track for AI
items.subtitle: 双轨模型
items.summary: Parallel exploration track (POC / technical validation) + delivery track (Sprint / milestones)
items.detail: AI projects carry far more uncertainty than traditional software. In YingjiChemAI, I used 2-week cycles to POC technical feasibility first, then entered formal Sprint iteration only after validation. The exploration track continuously reduces uncertainty while the delivery track protects milestones.

items.title: Data-Driven Iteration
items.subtitle: 数据驱动迭代
items.summary: Define KPIs → instrument → analyze → tune → validate in a closed loop
items.detail: For YingjiChemAI, I defined three core KPIs at launch: query accuracy, response time, processing efficiency. User feedback data drove multiple iterations that raised query accuracy from initial 78% to 92%, with response time held under 3 seconds.

items.title: Research Intelligence Framework
items.subtitle: 研究情报框架
items.summary: Taxonomy → Indicators → Sources → Matrix: a reusable 4-layer research methodology
items.detail: Intelligence framework designed for Ghana country research: 11-dimension Taxonomy (Politics/People/Economy etc.) + 256 indicators (57 Key / 199 Supporting) + 6 IMF dataset mappings (WEO/IFS/GFS/BOP/FSI/DOT) + 50×6 cross-validation matrix. Swap in another country and the whole framework applies. This is methodology as asset.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subtitle: 8 AI products · 4 verticals · delivered from 0 to 1

items.title: YingjiChemAI
items.subtitle: Full-stack AI research platform for chemistry
items.problem: Chemistry research teams spent 2-4 hours per day searching literature and extracting key information
items.solution: 8-module AI platform: chemical extraction · 6-model Q&A · 3-way hybrid retrieval · GraphRAG · AI report generation · literature assistant · data center · application center

items.title: DocMind
items.subtitle: Intelligent document parsing system
items.problem: Manual PDF processing took 2-4 hours per document
items.solution: Qwen-VL based PDF-to-Markdown parser: 300 concurrency, multi-API-key load balancing, page-level checkpoint recovery, YAML chart metadata generation

items.title: MetaRAG
items.subtitle: Multi-agent social science knowledge base
items.problem: Social science research needs multi-methodology presets, conversation tracking, country knowledge bases
items.solution: Declarative multi-agent orchestration (retrieve/summarize/reason/generate) with built-in Ghana research framework (11 dimensions / 256 indicators / 6 data sources)

items.title: PBIMCP
items.subtitle: Power BI MCP Server
items.problem: Researchers needed to learn DAX to query data — high barrier to entry
items.solution: 8-tool MCP Server supporting natural-language DAX queries, dataset management, chart generation, with OAuth 2.0 data security
impact: Closed loop between AI agents and BI data

items.title: AI Intelligence Analysis System
items.subtitle: Aerospace research institute
items.problem: Aerospace intelligence is fragmented across sources — manual aggregation is slow
items.solution: LLM+GraphRAG based intelligence system with multi-source auto-collection, aggregation analysis, and automated report generation. One of the earliest teams in China to introduce GraphRAG knowledge graphs
impact: Contributed to military-grade security compliance framework

items.title: eZoo AI Tour Guide Glasses
items.subtitle: Operations analytics dashboard
items.problem: Scenic area needed real-time monitoring of AI device status, visitor behavior, operations effectiveness
items.solution: Independently built a 5-dimension operations dashboard with TypeScript+Vite: device monitoring / visitor behavior / operations board / Q&A heat map / marketing tracking

items.title: E-commerce Big Data SaaS Platform
items.subtitle: Cross-border e-commerce customization
items.problem: Amazon sellers needed operations analytics, sales forecasting, supply chain optimization
items.solution: Translated business needs into technical requirements, coordinating with engineering to deliver data visualization, reporting, ERP analysis, blockchain traceability

items.title: Invention Patents × 2
items.detail: Multimodal LLM + GraphRAG based chemistry knowledge graph system · Declarative multi-AI-agent architecture for country knowledge base

items.title: Software Copyrights × 15
